title: Add audit logger service with JSONL file append
description: Create `logAuditEvent(event: { action: string; userId: string; resource: string; details?: string }): void` in `src/services/audit-logger.ts` that appends structured audit events to a JSONL file. Include co-located tests in `src/services/audit-logger.test.ts`.
existing_patterns: src/utils/logger/index.ts:fileTransport uses fs.appendFileSync for file appends — reuse for JSONL appending
src/services/notifications.ts:Class-based service pattern with constructor for deps
